body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Now that all component model code is in src and ext, we can move the constructors and `setup_and_run` functions in `setup_run.jl` into src too. This greatly simplifies the packages we need to load explicitly before running a simulation, and reduces code in experiments.

This PR sets us up nicely to split the experiments/ClimaEarth environment into 2: AMIP and CMIP (all deps from AMIP + Oceananigans, ClimaOcean, ClimaSeaIce, KernelAbstractions, ConservativeRegridding). If we decide to do that, it will be in a separate PR because it would touch many files

## Content
- [x] Move CoupledSimulation constructors and setup_and_run from experiments/ClimaEarth/setup_run.jl into src/SimCoordinator.jl
- [x] Export CoupledSimulation and setup_and_run from the top-level ClimaCoupler module
- [x] Replace setup_run.jl with code_loading.jl, which contains only the stderr redirect, using ClimaCoupler, and extension triggers (Makie, Oceananigans, ClimaLand, ClimaAtmos)
- [x] Update all scripts to include code_loading.jl instead of setup_run.jl
- [x] Move script-specific imports (Dates, ClimaCore, ClimaComms) out of the shared file and into the scripts that use them

<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: move setup_run.jl functions into src

## Purpose 
Make extension naming more uniform/consistent

## Content
- [x] rename `ClimaCouplerOceananigansMakieExt` to `ClimaCouplerCMIPMakieExt` so that it matches `ClimaCouplerCMIPExt`
- [x] rename `ext/climaland/` directory to `ext/ClimaCouplerClimaLandExt/` so it matches what we do for the other extensions with multiple files
- [x] update docs and all references to changed filepaths

body: ## Purpose This PR adds a Cess climate sensitivity test by comparing two existing AMIP longruns. This will run quickly after all runs have completed. Current output: ``` [ Info: Loading TOA fluxes [ Info: Global mean TOA flux changes (p2K − control): [ Info: delta_rsut = -0.667 W m⁻² [ Info: delta_rlut = 4.769 W m⁻² [ Info: delta_toa = 4.102 W m⁻² [ Info: Climate sensitivity estimate: [ Info: λ = delta_toa / delta_sst = 2.051 W m⁻² K⁻¹ [ Info: Approximate ECS = ERF_2xCO2 / λ ≈ 1.8 K ``` (generated from `/scratch/clima/slurm-buildkite/climacoupler-longruns/1063/climacoupler-longruns)
title: Add equilibrium climate sensitivity test to longruns
